pipeline.title: 用 was/were/had 描述过去状态
pipeline.chunk: I was / They were / I had
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 我以前是/他们是/我有过

items.answer: I had a cat when I was young.
I was very shy back then.
I used to live in Shanghai.
At that time, I was too young.
I grew up in a small town.
My previous job was in a bank.

pipeline.title: I was [adj/noun] when/before/back then 过去状态操练

items.answer: I was very shy back then.
I was too young at that time.
I had a dog when I was young.

pipeline.title: used to 一词多句

items.answer: I used to live in Shanghai.
I used to be very shy.
He used to be my colleague.
She used to have long hair.
In the past, people used to write letters.
Did you use to live here?
Did he use to be your teacher?

pipeline.title: former / previous 一词多句

items.answer: My former teacher was very kind.
My former boss was very strict.
My former home was very small.
My previous job was in a bank.

items.zh: 这和我之前想的不一样。
items.answer: This is different from what I previously thought.
In the past, people wrote letters.
In the past, it was very quiet here.

pipeline.title: childhood / grow up 一词多句

items.answer: When I was young, I was very shy.
I had a dog when I was young.
I lived in Beijing when I was young.
I grew up in a small town.
I grew up by the sea.

pipeline.title: 从过去状态到变化逐步扩展

levels.label: 加细节
levels.en: I was a student before. I used to live in Shanghai.
levels.zh: 我以前是学生。我曾住在上海。
levels.highlight: I used to live in Shanghai.

levels.label: 加现在
levels.en: I was a student before. I used to live in Shanghai. But now I work in Beijing.
levels.zh: 我以前是学生。我曾住在上海。但现在我在北京工作。
levels.highlight: But now I work in Beijing.

pipeline.title: 用 at home / at work / outside 回答 Where were you?
pipeline.chunk: at home / at work / outside / inside
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 在家/在工作/在外面/在里面

items.answer: Where were you yesterday? — I was at home.

items.zh: 她昨天在学校吗？——不，她在工作。
items.answer: Was she at school yesterday? — No, she was at work.
The cat was outside all night.

items.zh: 我们在里面，因为下雨了。
items.answer: We were inside because of the rain.
I was at home all day yesterday.
Were you present at the meeting?
He was at work when I called.
I was nearby when it happened.

pipeline.title: Were you [place]? — Yes/No, I was [place] 位置问答操练

items.zh: 你昨天在家吗？——在，我整天在家。
items.answer: Were you at home yesterday? — Yes, I was at home all day.

items.zh: 你当时在学校吗？——不，我在工作。
items.answer: Were you at school? — No, I was at work.

items.zh: 他当时在外面吗？——在，他在花园。
items.answer: Was he outside? — Yes, he was in the garden.

items.zh: 你当时一个人在吗？——是的，我一个人。
items.answer: Were you alone? — Yes, I was alone.

items.zh: 她当时在别处吗？——对，她不在家。
items.answer: Was she elsewhere? — Yes, she was not at home.

pipeline.title: absent / present 一词多句

items.answer: Were you present at the meeting?
He was not present at that time.

items.zh: 我找不到我的钱包——它不见了。
items.answer: I couldn't find my wallet — it was missing.

pipeline.title: alone / inside / outside 一词多句

items.answer: We were inside because of the rain.
The cat was outside all night.

pipeline.title: nearby / elsewhere / nowhere 一词多句

items.answer: I was nearby when it happened.
He was elsewhere at that time.
He was nowhere to be found.

pipeline.title: 从位置到原因逐步扩展

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I was at home yesterday because it was raining outside.
levels.zh: 我昨天在家，因为外面在下雨。

levels.label: 加对比
levels.en: I was at home yesterday because it was raining outside. But my brother was at work.
levels.zh: 我昨天在家因为下雨了。但我哥哥在工作。
levels.highlight: But my brother was at work.

pipeline.title: 用规则动词过去式 (-ed) 描述昨天做的事
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 到达了/搬了/查了/计划了/...

items.answer: I checked my phone this morning.

items.zh: 我们计划了一个惊喜派对。
我注意到一个奇怪的声音。
她带我参观了她的新房子。
items.answer: She showed me her new house.

pipeline.title: I [verb-ed] [time] 过去动作操练

items.answer: I checked my email this morning.
I decided to stay at home.

pipeline.title: arrive / move 一词多句

items.zh: 我到的时候已经天黑了。
items.answer: It was already dark when I arrived.

items.zh: 你是什么时候搬到这里的？

items.answer: I want to move to the beach.

pipeline.title: check / seem 一词多句

items.answer: I checked my phone this morning.
It seemed like a good idea.

pipeline.title: plan / decide / reply 一词多句

items.zh: 我们计划了一个惊喜派对。

items.answer: I decided to give it a try.

pipeline.title: 从动作到结果逐步扩展

levels.label: 加发现
levels.en: I checked my phone and noticed a new message.
levels.zh: 我查了手机，注意到一条新消息。

levels.label: 加反应
levels.en: I checked my phone and noticed a new message. I replied right away.
levels.zh: 我查了手机注意到一条新消息。我马上回复了。

pipeline.title: 用 went / saw / said / got / made 等不规则过去式造句
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 去了/看见了/说了/得到了/做了

items.answer: I went to the store yesterday.

items.zh: 我昨晚看了一部好电影。
items.answer: I saw a great movie last night.
She made a cake for me.
I took a lot of pictures.

items.zh: 我昨天买了一件新夹克。
items.answer: I bought a new jacket yesterday.
I spoke to my boss yesterday.

pipeline.title: [subject] [past-verb] [object] [time] 不规则动词操练

items.answer: I went to the store yesterday.
I took a lot of pictures.

pipeline.title: go → went 一词多句

items.answer: I went to the store yesterday.
I went to the beach last weekend.
We went to see a movie.
We went for a walk together.
How was the exam? — It went well.

pipeline.title: get → got 一词多句

items.zh: 我今天早上收到一条消息。
items.answer: I got a message this morning.

pipeline.title: think → thought / feel → felt 一词多句

items.answer: I thought the movie was good.

pipeline.title: 从不规则动词到叙述逐步扩展

levels.label: 加遇见
levels.en: I went to a party. I saw many friends there.
levels.zh: 我去了一个派对。看到了很多朋友。

levels.label: 加感受
levels.en: I went to a party. I saw many friends there. I felt really happy.
levels.zh: 我去了一个派对。看到了很多朋友。我感到非常开心。

pipeline.title: 用 last weekend / last year 讲述经历

items.zh: 上周末我去了一个派对。
items.answer: Last weekend, I went to a party.
I took a trip to Shanghai last year.

items.zh: 我上个月参加了一个活动。
items.answer: I went to an event last month.
We had guests over last weekend.

items.zh: 他们给了我一个大惊喜。
items.answer: They gave me a big surprise.

items.zh: 我对那天有美好的回忆。
items.answer: I have a great memory of that day.

items.zh: 上周末我们庆祝了她的生日。
items.answer: We celebrated her birthday last weekend.

pipeline.title: Last [time], I [past-verb] [extra] 经历叙述操练

items.zh: 上周末我去了一个派对。
items.answer: Last weekend, I went to a party.

items.zh: 上个月我参加了一个活动。
items.answer: Last month, I went to an event.

items.zh: 昨天晚上我看了一部电影。
items.answer: Last night, I saw a movie.

items.zh: 上周我们庆祝了她的生日。
items.answer: Last week, we celebrated her birthday.

pipeline.title: experience / memory 一词多句

items.zh: 你有没有过类似的经历？
items.answer: Have you had a similar experience?

items.zh: 我对那天有美好的回忆。
items.answer: I have a great memory of that day.
I remember it rained that day.

pipeline.title: trip / journey 一词多句

items.answer: I took a trip to Shanghai last year.

items.zh: 我们上个月去海边旅行了。
items.answer: We took a trip to the beach last month.
I went to a party last night.

items.zh: 我们为你准备了一个惊喜派对。
items.answer: We had a surprise party for you.
The party was so much fun!

pipeline.title: guest / host / celebrate 一词多句

items.answer: We had guests over last weekend.

items.zh: 你愿意主持这个活动吗？
items.answer: Would you like to host the event?

items.zh: 上周末我们庆祝了她的生日。
items.answer: We celebrated her birthday last weekend.

pipeline.title: 从时间到故事逐步扩展

levels.label: 说时间事件
levels.en: Last weekend, I went to a party.
levels.zh: 上周末我去了一个派对。

levels.label: 加细节
levels.en: Last weekend, I went to a party. It was a surprise party for my friend.
levels.zh: 上周末我去了一个派对。是给朋友的惊喜派对。
levels.highlight: It was a surprise party for my friend.

levels.label: 加感受
levels.en: Last weekend, I went to a surprise party for my friend. We celebrated all night. It was an amazing experience!
levels.zh: 上周末去了朋友的惊喜派对。我们庆祝了一整晚。真是一次很棒的体验！

pipeline.title: 用 didn't / Did / actually / neither 表达否定和疑问

items.answer: I didn't go. — Neither did I.

items.zh: 我怀疑那个故事是真的。
items.answer: I doubt that story is true.

items.zh: 真的假的？你真的做了吗？
items.answer: Seriously? Did you really do that?

pipeline.title: Did you [verb]? — No, I didn't. / Actually, I did 问答操练

items.zh: 你昨天去学校了吗？——没有。
items.answer: Did you go to school yesterday? — No, I didn't.

items.zh: 你看那部电影了吗？——其实我看了。
items.answer: Did you see that movie? — Actually, I did.

items.zh: 你吃早餐了吗？——没有。你呢？
items.answer: Did you eat breakfast? — No, I didn't. Did you?
Did you make the call? — I forgot.

items.zh: 他说实话了吗？——我觉得没有。
items.answer: Did he tell the truth? — I doubt it.

pipeline.title: wonder / doubt 一词多句

items.answer: I wonder if she will come.

items.zh: 我怀疑那个故事是真的。
items.answer: I doubt that story is true.
To tell the truth, I don't know.

pipeline.title: neither / either 一词多句

items.answer: I didn't go. — Neither did I.
I didn't see it. — Neither did I.
I don't like it. — Neither do I.
Actually, what he said wasn't true.
Did you go? — Actually, I did.

pipeline.title: admit / deny / seriously 一词多句

items.zh: 真的假的？你真的做了吗？
items.answer: Seriously? Did you really do that?

pipeline.title: 从否定到疑问逐步扩展

levels.label: 否定
levels.en: I didn't go to the party.

levels.label: 加反问
levels.en: I didn't go to the party. Did you go?

levels.label: 加回应
levels.en: I didn't go to the party. Did you go? — Neither did I. Actually, nobody went.
levels.zh: 我没去派对。你去了吗？——我也没去。其实没人去。
levels.highlight: Neither did I. Actually, nobody went.
